description_long: This is a medium-sized fishing or utility boat with a weathered, industrial appearance. The hull is predominantly black with red accents and features a white star emblem on the side. The cabin is yellow with large windows and is equipped with orange life rings and a roof rack holding supplies or equipment. The deck is open and contains barrels, ropes, and a winch system, suggesting it is used for work or transport. Metal railings run along the perimeter for safety, and the boat is fitted with a tall blue mast and rigging. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible signs of wear and rust, indicating regular use in a working environment.
description: A weathered, industrial utility boat with a yellow cabin, black and red hull, and visible work equipment such as barrels, ropes, and life rings. The boat features metal railings, a blue mast, and a rugged, functional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow cabin, black and red hull, life rings, and the open deck with barrels and equipment.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the bow, forward railings, and the winch system at the center of the deck.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the star emblem, barrels, and the open deck layout with the cabin and mast.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stern, life rings, and the back of the cabin with visible deck equipment.
